name: f1-calendar
description: F1 verseny naptár alkalmazás ICS szinkronizációval

scripts.status:prod-port: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { $conn | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String } else { 'No listener on 3001' }"
scripts.stop:prod: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $conn) { Write-Output 'No listener on 3001'; exit 0 }; $procIds = $conn | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($procId in $procIds) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output ('Stopped PID ' + $procId) }"
